name: Natural Camouflage
description: This model gains the following abilities:

granted_abilities.name: Adapt and Overcome
granted_abilities.text: When this model declares a non-general action, it may choose one friendly attached upgrade to receive a (t) and one suit to that action's Skl. After resolving the action, discard the chosen upgrade.

granted_abilities.name: Stealth
granted_abilities.text: While more than 6" away from this model, enemy models cannot target it and ignore it when drawing LoS.
